mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_post_id.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO posts ( post_id, user_id, board_id, title, content_posts, price, category, location, status, view_count, created_at_posts ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{boardId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{price}, #{category}, #{location}, #{status}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url, u.nickname AS nickname,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite pf_count WHERE pf_count.post_id = p.post_id ) AS favorite_count,
CASE WHEN #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_favorite pf WHERE pf.post_id = p.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited
FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY p.created_at_posts DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url, u.nickname AS nickname,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite pf_count WHERE pf_count.post_id = p.post_id ) AS favorite_count,
CASE WHEN #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_favorite pf WHERE pf.post_id = p.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited
FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE 1=1
AND p.title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND p.category = #{category}
ORDER BY
p.price ASC p.price DESC p.created_at_posts DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url, u.nickname AS nickname,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite pf_count WHERE pf_count.post_id = p.post_id ) AS favorite_count,
CASE WHEN #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_favorite pf WHERE pf.post_id = p.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited
FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content_posts = #{content}, price = #{price}, category = #{category}, location = #{location} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url, u.nickname AS nickname FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at_posts DESC
